creator: healer@rpi.edu
text:
Installing sympa from ports, no matter which database backend I select, only 
/usr/local/libexec/sympa/create_db.Sybase is installed.  The package install message references running /usr/local/libexec/sympa/create_db.mysql or /usr/local/libexec/sympa/create_db.Pg depending on which back end is selected.

I have tried to build with MySQL and Postgres backends to leverage existing database servers.

It would be helpful if the port was modified to install the correct database creation script or modify the port to require Sybase and not offer other database options.
